race.name: Bedrichov Night Light Marathon
race.tagline: Thirty kilometers through the Jizera Mountains by headlamp and moonlight — the atmospheric evening prelude to the legendary Jizerska 50.

climate.description: Late January in the Jizera Mountains at 700-1,000m means consistent cold and reliable snow. Evening start means temperatures drop steadily throughout the race, typically from -5°C to -15°C. Night racing adds wind chill and visibility challenges.
challenges: Night racing — headlamp required, reduced visibility
Dropping temperatures during the race as evening progresses
Wind chill on exposed mountain sections
Navigation challenges on unlit forest sections

course.primary: A 30km freestyle night race on the same trail network as the legendary Jizerska 50, illuminated by headlamps and moonlight. The course winds through the dense spruce forests of the Jizera Mountains at 700-1,000m altitude, with moderate climbing and descents.
course.surface: Machine-groomed mountain trails through spruce forests
course.grooming: Jizerska 50 trail network — well-maintained Czech Nordic infrastructure
features: Night racing through the Jizera Mountains — headlamps and moonlight
Same trail network as the legendary Jizerska 50
Dense spruce forest atmosphere amplified by darkness
Atmospheric prelude to the Jizerska 50 weekend

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Night race format is unique and atmospheric but limits scenery scoring. Benefits from excellent Jizerska 50 trail infrastructure and grooming. Moderate field and primarily Czech/regional participation.

history.summary: The Bedrichov Night Light Marathon is an atmospheric evening race held on the same Jizera Mountains trail network that hosts the legendary Jizerska 50. Racing by headlamp through snow-covered spruce forests, it serves as both the traditional SkiTour season opener and the atmospheric prelude to the Jizerska 50 weekend. The night format creates a unique experience that sets it apart from conventional daytime marathons.
notable_facts: Night race format — skiers race by headlamp and moonlight
Uses the same trail network as the Worldloppet Jizerska 50
Held in the Jizera Mountains, a memorial to 15 Czech mountaineers lost in Peru (1970)
The darkness transforms familiar Jizerska trails into an entirely different experience

youtube_data.search_query: Bedrichov Night Light Marathon cross country ski race Bedrichov

videos.title: Bedřichovský Night Light Marathon (sobota 4.1. 2020)
videos.description: Po pátečních závodech volnou technikou přišla v sobotu na řadu klasika! Nejmenší závodníci a po nich také dospěláci si užili noční atmosféru zasněženého Bedřichova . První zastávka letošní ČEZ SkiTour je za námi, budeme se těšit už 18. a 19. ledna na Zadově!
